name: pixelPATT
comment:
pixelPATT™: Joining Robe’s line of retro style lighting products is pixelPATT, the latest addition to the PATT family. In spite of its eye catching retro design, pixelPATT is based on modern LED pixel controlled technology.

For full data (consuption, voltage etc.) please add PATT Driver.

capabilities.comment: Ranbow effect (with fade time) from slow to fast
Ranbow effect (without fade time) from slow to fast
Forwards rotation from fast to slow
Backwards rotation from slow to fast

gwSpecs.description:
Joining Robe’s line of retro style lighting products is pixelPATT, the latest addition to the PATT family. In spite of its eye catching retro design, pixelPATT is based on modern LED pixel controlled technology.

For full data (consuption, voltage etc.) please add PATT Driver.
